Interglobe Aviation Ltd

Interglobe Aviat Summary Chart Analysis Peers Quarters Profit & Loss Balance Sheet Cash Flow Ratios Investors Documents

Interglobe Aviation Ltd

₹ 5,124 -5.02%
08 Jul - close price
goindigo.in BSE: 539448 NSE: INDIGO
About

Interglobe Aviation Ltd (Indigo) is India’s largest passenger airline operating as a low-cost carrier. Serving 86 destinations including 24 international destinations, it provides passengers with a simple, unbundled product, fulfilling its singular brand promise of providing “low fares, on-time flights, and a courteous and hassle-free service” to its customers. IndiGo commenced operations in August 2006 with a single aircraft and has grown its fleet to 262 aircrafts. [1]

Key Points

Market Leadership:[1]
As of FY26, IndiGo has a market share of ~64% in the Indian aviation segment. It has a market share of ~21% in the international passenger segment and has become the 8th largest airline in the world measured by daily departures and the company has 440+ aircrafts.

Website BSE NSE
  • Market Cap ₹ 1,98,070 Cr.
  • Current Price ₹ 5,124
  • High / Low ₹ 6,232 / 3,895
  • Stock P/E
  • Book Value ₹ 180
  • Dividend Yield 0.20 %
  • ROCE 7.12 %
  • ROE -12.2 %
  • Face Value ₹ 10.0

Pros

Cons

  • Stock is trading at 28.4 times its book value
  • Company has low interest coverage ratio.
  • Promoter holding has decreased over last 3 years: -26.3%

* The classifications might have changed from Sep'2022 onwards. The new XBRL format added more details from Sep'22 onwards.

Classifications such as banks and foreign portfolio investors were not available earlier. The sudden changes in FII or DII can be because of these changes.

Click on the line-items to see the names of individual entities.

Documents

Announcements

All
  • Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Allotment of ESOP / ESPS
    1d - InterGlobe Aviation Limited has informed regarding allotment of ESOPs
  • Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Change in Management
    30 Jun - InterGlobe Aviation appoints Kanwal Jeet Singh Bakshi as CHRO from July 20, 2026; Sukhjit Singh Pasricha resigns.
  • Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Credit Rating
    30 Jun - CRISIL continued IndiGo’s AA-/A1+ ratings on Watch Developing for ₹9,000 crore bank facilities.
  • Closure of Trading Window
    24 Jun - Trading window closes July 1, 2026 until 48 hours after Q1 FY27 results.
  • Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Investor Presentation 8 Jun
